{{CargoRelic
|name=Father's Photo
|class_id=20088
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source= You must shoot the Unknown Creature in front of your shrine with Incense 10 times in order to obtain the Father's Photo relic
|description=On the back of this strange photo is some illegible handwriting. After identification by a linguist, it was said this text means father, that is how it got its name, and connoisseurs across the world regard it as exemplary avant-garde art, and it has become a precious piece of art collection.
|fame=14
|art=13
|fth=18
|civ=30
|tech=15
|ss1=Snail Leadership +1
|ss2=Snail Leadership +2
|ss3=Snail Leadership +3
|ss4=Snail Leadership +3
|ss7=Snail Leadership +3<br> (Awakened)
}}
